## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, performance tracking, and upcoming priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Production:** 4 new articles are live and indexed. Talaera will provide banner-style CTA graphics by tomorrow to improve visual engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:** GrowthX will gain Amplitude access to track lead generation, focusing on the new "Business English platforms" category for its high commercial intent.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [**Competitor Content:** The Preply comparison article is a top priority, requiring extra attention and detailed feedback to ensure its accuracy and effectiveness against a key competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [**New Priority:** The "English for Engineers" article will be prioritized for next week to provide content for a new landing page.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Performance

  - [**Live Content:** 4 articles are published and indexed, now visible in the Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [**CTAs:** Talaera will create banner-style CTA graphics by tomorrow to improve visual engagement and reduce screen space compared to the current square format.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [**Tracking Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [**Goal:** Track lead generation from new content.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [**Tooling:** GrowthX will gain Amplitude access.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
      - [**Focus:** The new "Business English platforms" category (e.g., "Babbel alternatives") will be closely monitored due to its high commercial intent.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)

### Content Generation Process: Atlas Platform

  - [Aida demoed Atlas, GrowthX's internal AI platform, to show how content is created.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
    1.  [**Input:** Topic, direction, H2/H3 outline (human-led to match search intent).](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
    2.  [**Research:** Tavoli (or EXA for technical topics) creates a detailed knowledge base to prevent "thin" content.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
    3.  [**Drafting:** AI generates content, applies writing guidelines, and adds internal/source links.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
    4.  [**Proofreading:** A separate AI checklist enforces rules (e.g., subheading case) to handle LLM limitations.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)
    5.  [**Fact-Checking:** An AI validates claims against research. If a claim lacks a credible source, the AI rewrites it to be less definitive.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
    6.  [**Manual Review:** A human editor performs a final check for accuracy, links, and overall quality.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)

### Performance Forecasting & Reporting

  - [**Traffic Forecast:** A Google Sheet model projects traffic based on Talaera's Domain Authority (38) and global search volumes.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
      - [**Note:** The forecast flattens around month 8 because it's based on the current 102 target keywords, which will be expanded.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [**Position Tracking:** A SEMrush report tracks keyword rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
      - [**Baseline:** The current average position is 84, as Talaera has no content for these new keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
      - [**Expectation:** This position will improve significantly as new content is published, targeting low-difficulty keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)

### Content Priorities & Feedback

  - [**General Feedback:** Writing style is strong. The team is still adjusting to the new competitor-comparison content format.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [**Preply Article:** This is the highest priority.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Preply is a primary competitor, and the article must be accurate and effective, especially after Preply's recent $150M funding round.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will dedicate extra time; Talaera should provide detailed feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [**"English for Engineers" Article:** This article will be prioritized for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Talaera needs content for a new landing page targeting engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Paola:** Create and deliver banner-style CTA graphics by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
      - [Share the traffic forecast Google Sheet via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
      - [Provide instructions for GrowthX to gain Amplitude access.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
      - [Confirm with the GrowthX team on typical keyword ranking improvements (e.g., at 3, 6, 9 months).](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
      - [Prioritize the "English for Engineers" article for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Jzz5J9yEEHfTA4ENEiEsro7f8wFze9Zv?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
